profile_summary: Solo traveler (mid budget) prioritizing business & wifi, quietness.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Magnolia, Lima ranks #1 for this traveler on business & wifi (+0.84), quietness (+0.86), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The business center and conference facilities were excellent, ideal for work trips."

supporting_evidence.quote: The business center and conference facilities were excellent, ideal for work trips.
Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect.
Meeting rooms were well-equipped and the WiFi was rock solid for video calls.

recommendations.justification: Hotel Vista, Mumbai ranks #2 for this traveler on business & wifi (+0.73), quietness (+0.79), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect."

supporting_evidence.quote: Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect.
Slept beautifully — very quiet despite being central.
The business center and conference facilities were excellent, ideal for work trips.
